sections.paragraph:
δέσμη (Lobeck, Paralipomena Gramm. Graec. 1837, 396, or δεσμή as the gramm. Herodian I 324, 10; II 426, 6 [Lentz] would accent it) ης, ἡ bundle (since Demosth. and Theophr., HP 9, 17, 1; Diod S 19, 99, 2 δέσμη καλάμων; Dionys. Hal. 3, 61, 2; pap [Mayser 285; 435]; Ex 12:22) δῆσαι εἰς δέσμας tie up in bundles Mt 13:30.—DELG s.v. δέω 1. M-M. TW.

gramm. gramm. (after a personal name)=grammaticus, grammarian

Herodian Herodian = Herodianus Historicus, III a.d.—List 5

Demosth Demosth , IV b.c.—List 5

Theophr Theophr , IV–III b.c.—List 5

Diod S Diod S , I b.c.—List 5

pap pap = papyrus, -yri

Mayser Mayser = EM., Grammatik der griechischen Papyri aus der Ptolemäerzeit—Lists 4, 6

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

TW TW = Theologisches Wörterbuch zum NT; tr. GBromiley, Theological Dictionary of the NT—List 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 219
